title: ElevenLabs API keys should not be disclosed
description: ElevenLabs is an AI voice synthesis platform used for text-to-speech, voice cloning, and audio generation. API keys provide access to voice generation, voice cloning, and speech synthesis at the account's expense. Exposing keys allows unauthorized use incurring costs and potential misuse for deepfake audio generation.
recommendation: Remove ElevenLabs API keys from source code. Store them in environment variables. Rotate exposed keys immediately at elevenlabs.io/app/profile.
impact: Unauthorized voice generation at your account's expense, potential misuse for voice cloning/deepfakes, and access to custom voice models.

checks.message: ElevenLabs API key detected (sk_ prefix). ElevenLabs API keys provide access to AI voice synthesis, voice cloning, and text-to-speech generation. Exposing this key allows unauthorized use of your ElevenLabs account incurring significant costs, cloning custom voices you've created, generating audio content billed to your account, and potential misuse for creating deepfake audio. Revoke immediately at elevenlabs.io/app/profile.

ElevenLabs API key detected in variable assignment. ElevenLabs provides AI voice synthesis and voice cloning. Exposing the API key allows unlimited text-to-speech generation billed to your account, access to your custom voice clones, and potential misuse for impersonation or disinformation audio. Rotate immediately at elevenlabs.io.
